The '''Imperial Hall of Heroes''' was a commemorative monument in honor to those who [[Death/Legends|died]] in service of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. 

==History==
In [[5 BBY/Legends|5 BBY]], a new wing for the Hall of Heroes was being constructed by Imperial [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Pter Nyklas]] who was using [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Slavery/Legends|slaves]] to complete the work. Nyklas repeatedly whipped and beat his Wookiee workforce, so much so that [[Chewbacca/Legends|one Wookiee]] eventually rose up in anger against him. Nyklas drew his [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] but was prevented from killing Chewbacca by then- [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]]. The two fled Coruscant and took up [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggling]] careers.<ref name="HuttGambit" />
